docs:
# Border Beam
A comet-like beam that traces the perimeter of a rounded surface.
## Import
```tsx
import { BorderBeam } from "@/components/ui/border-beam";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<BorderBeam size={220} duration="8s" colorFrom="#a855f7" colorTo="#22d3ee" columns={undefined} showAvatar={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **size** (number) — default: `220`: Beam size
- **duration** (number) — default: `8`: Duration
- **colorFrom** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: From
- **colorTo** (string) — default: `"#22d3ee"`: To
- **columns** (number): Columns
- **showAvatar** (boolean): Show avatar row
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add border-beam
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/border-beam
```
